title: ferray-ufunc: divmod computes floor_divide and remainder separately — double work
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

divmod() in arithmetic.rs calls floor_divide(a, b) and remainder(a, b) independently, iterating over both arrays twice and doing the division twice. NumPy's divmod ufunc computes both results in a single pass. Fix: single iteration that computes both quot = floor(x/y) and rem in one pass.
